name: @liyuanlin/namechanger
description: 文件批量重命名和内容替换工具 - CLI工具

scripts.clean:win: if exist dist rd /s /q dist && if exist *.tgz del /q *.tgz
scripts.pack:local: npm run clean && npm run build && npm pack
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run check:registry
scripts.publish:public: npm version patch && npm publish --access public
scripts.check:registry: node -e "const r=require;const s=r('child_process').execSync('npm config get registry').toString().trim();if(!s.includes('registry.npmjs.org')){console.error('Error: Current registry is not npm official:',s);console.error('Please use: npm config set registry https://registry.npmjs.org');process.exit(1);}console.log('✓ Registry check passed:',s);"
scripts.release: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run publish:npm
scripts.release:minor: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run publish:minor
scripts.release:major: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run publish:major

author: liyuanlin138@gmail.com
